messages.body: Task 4 complete. Verdict: REQUEST CHANGES. Key findings: (1) rollback-drill contract cannot prove 2 successful drills, (2) readServingVersion serves with null rollback target, (3) serving path falls back to env/latest when control row is missing/error, (4) forecast ship gate omits confidence-gating inputs and is not wired into production. Verification: tsc PASS, focused tests PASS (107), lint PASS, end-to-end/control-plane wiring FAIL.

worker-3 completed task 3. Verdict REQUEST CHANGES. Local task result updated with concrete findings + verification evidence; major blockers are incomplete inferred-boundary handling, unwired promotion/bridge/forecast-serving paths, and missing TCAR-020 docs.
